Screenpipe Browser Bridge

Lets the screenpipe app use your open browser tabs when an agent needs web context. Your data stays local.

click connect, then approve the request in the screenpipe desktop app. no API token copy/paste needed.
verify request
Advanced only. In screenpipe: Settings → Privacy → API Authentication → reveal and copy the key. Or run screenpipe auth token.
Default is http://127.0.0.1:3030. Only change this if you run screenpipe on a different host or port.
screenpi.pe · source
